channel.title: Zara Zinsfuss on
channel.description: Recent content in Zara Zinsfuss on

item.title: Maintained Gitbooks
item.description: Following titles are maintained as gitbooks: The Book Which Tells The Truth by Rael Extraterrestrials Took Me To Their Planet by Rael Hamlet’s Mill: An Essay Investigating the Origins of Human Knowledge and Its Transmission Through Myth by Giorgio de Santillana and Hertha von Dechend

item.title: Further reading
item.description: Wheel of Heaven is a knowledge base around the working theory that life on Earth was intelligently designed by an extraterrestrial civilization, the so-called Elohim.

item.title: Hello World!👋
item.description: Introducing Doks, a Hugo theme helping you build modern documentation websites that are secure, fast, and SEO-ready — by default.

item.title: Summary
item.description: Wheel of Heaven is a knowledge base around the working theory that life on Earth was intelligently designed by an extraterrestrial civilization, the so-called Elohim.
